title: MCP Server Trigger Invalid Type Error
symptom: When executing the MCP server trigger with the LinkedIn data hunter tool, an error occurs indicating an invalid type with an expected object but received undefined.
not_this_if: Using a different tool or endpoint
Error does not mention invalid type
root_cause: The error occurs because the request to the `/search-posts` endpoint is being made using a GET method instead of the required POST method, and no request body is being sent, which is necessary for the operation.
fix_steps: Change the request method from GET to POST for the /search-posts endpoint.
Ensure that a valid request body is included in the POST request according to the API documentation.
Test the MCP server trigger again.
agent_instruction: Change the request method to POST and include the required request body for the MCP server trigger.
